title: Release Gate P1 - Production Env Activation

transitions.note: Production Team Mode activation is tracked separately from PR30. Code and local checks are green, but production still requires Upstash Redis env, ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, redeploy, and smoke verification.
Current blocker: production /api/team-run can return 503 if the backend ENABLE_TEAM_MODE flag is not enabled while UI is exposed.

notes: Definition of Done: Upstash Redis env variables are present in Vercel Production; ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true and NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true are present in Vercel Production; production redeploy is READY; /api/health returns only {"status":"ok"}; /team renders active Team Mode UI; unauthenticated POST /api/team-run is blocked by auth instead of feature-flag 503; an authenticated user can run Team Mode; Upstash-backed rate limits are verified for Team Mode, admin routes, and /api/guest.
